meta.purpose: Trading-day market-open financial intelligence report for Jun; not an automatic broker.
precedentBasis: FRED: source trust, release metadata, composable indicators
Bloomberg/Koyfin/TradingView: market cockpit, watchlists, cross-asset tape
BIS/Treasury: liquidity, credit, fiscal plumbing, data dictionaries
World Bank/JPMorgan/BlackRock: report-native chartbook and committee framing
liveDataSources: Yahoo Finance chart API public/unofficial endpoint

marketRegime.inflation: Live proxy: breakeven/rates check required; see FRED T10YIE
marketRegime.mostImportantMacroSignal: 2Y/10Y curve is 0.50 pts; watch rate pressure and cycle signal.
marketRegime.confidence: Medium for prices/rates; low for fundamentals/news until adapters are added.
evidence: FRED CSV endpoint for Treasury/rates/credit indicators

kostolanyCycle.interpretation: Core compounders still supported, but levered/speculative exposures need stricter review because crowding and liquidity sensitivity can dominate fundamentals.
evidence: Risk appetite mixed with higher rates
Speculative beta requires separate risk bucket

holdings.watch: AI capex efficiency, antitrust, valuation compression.
holdings.actionRationale: Keep as core unless earnings revisions or valuation expectations materially deteriorate.

holdings.watch: Consumer slowdown, AWS competition, fulfillment costs.
holdings.actionRationale: Core hold; monitor whether AWS acceleration offsets consumer softness.

holdings.watch: Crowded AI-power narrative, regulation, valuation stretch.
holdings.actionRationale: Keep but watch expectation risk; do not add blindly into narrative heat.

holdings.thesis: Ad engine resilience + AI engagement + operating leverage.
holdings.watch: AI capex, regulation, metaverse spend creep.
holdings.actionRationale: Core hold while ad momentum and margins support thesis.

holdings.watch: Decay, path dependency, TSLA volatility, misunderstood yield.
holdings.actionRationale: Treat as risk product, not investment compounder; trim if portfolio risk budget tightens.

holdings.thesis: Crypto liquidity upside via Coinbase beta.
holdings.watch: Leverage decay, crypto drawdowns, correlated risk.
holdings.actionRationale: Requires explicit reason to keep; hidden correlation and decay make it a review priority.

holdings.watch: Index concentration and broad market drawdown.
holdings.actionRationale: Keep as baseline unless portfolio strategy changes.

holdings.thesis: Secular payments, pricing power, high-margin network.
holdings.actionRationale: Core quality compounder; compare against SPY opportunity cost.

holdings.thesis: Potential asymmetry if thesis is real.
holdings.actionRationale: No action until thesis, filings, liquidity, and downside case are verified.

holdings.thesis: Potential asymmetry if thesis is real.
holdings.actionRationale: No action until thesis, filings, liquidity, and downside case are verified.

holdings.thesis: Pricing power, ad tier, content scale.
holdings.actionRationale: Hold but watch valuation versus subscriber/ads expectations.

newsMonitoring.item: Replace sample with live material news scan
Levered product decay and underlying movement
newsMonitoring.requiredSource: ETF/ETN issuer pages + underlying price action

valuationExpectation.method: Compare current valuation, earnings revisions, guidance, growth quality, and implied expectations against SPY opportunity cost.
valuationExpectation.status: Partially live: price, market value, weights, recent performance, rates, and credit are active. Fundamentals/valuation estimates still need provider.

rebalance.rationale: Levered/speculative exposures require review before adding risk. Core quality bucket remains intact.
addWatch: To be generated by Opportunity Scout from live regime + valuation screens.
doNotDo: Do not turn this into automatic trading.
Do not use mock data for decisions.
Do not assign BUY/SELL language; use allowed action signals only.

opportunityScout.method: Generate 10 candidates from active market force fields, then promote top 3 for deeper research only when evidence supports material asymmetry.

keyRisks: Levered products can decay even if the broad thesis is directionally right.
AI infrastructure narratives can become crowded before fundamentals catch up.
Macro rate pressure can compress valuation multiples across long-duration equities.
Unknown speculative tickers need thesis verification before any conclusion.
humanReviewRequired: Any EXIT REVIEW or TRIM CANDIDATE wording
Any valuation conclusion based on unverified data

finalOutput.mostImportantHoldingUpdate: CONL and TSLT remain the risk-control focus in the sample state.
finalOutput.finalJudgment: Live public market/rates data is active. Next layer: fundamentals, valuation, news/filings, global institution report ingestion, and chartbook publishing.

watchTriggers: If VIX moves above 22, reduce speculative/levered risk review threshold.
If 10Y Treasury continues rising, pressure-test high-duration AI/cloud multiples.
If HY spreads widen materially, treat risk appetite as fragile even if indices stay green.
strategy.strategyPosture: Preserve core compounders, isolate levered/path-dependent risk, scout adds only where valuation and catalyst align.

globalInstitutionSources.use: Rates, inflation, growth, labor, liquidity release metadata
Global liquidity, credit, cross-border banking, financial stability plumbing
Country macro, policy, fiscal/external risk context
Growth outlooks, regional risk framing, development/macro reports
Debt, deficit, fiscal flows, interest expense
Capital market assumptions, asset allocation regimes, chartbook framing
Company fundamentals, risk factors, filings, earnings evidence
